title: Insert into a Binary Search Tree
input_format: The root of a BST and an integer value `val` to insert.
output_format: The root of the BST after inserting the new value.
constraints:
- The number of nodes in the tree is in the range `[0, 10^4]`.
- `-10^8 <= Node.val <= 10^8`
- All values in the BST are unique.
- `val` is guaranteed not to exist in the original BST.
function_signature: function insertIntoBST(root: TreeNode | null, val: number): TreeNode | null {}
